author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Our Fav Little Toy Story Guys w/ Co-Director & Story Lead | The Pixar Show: Toy Story 5
he Pixar Show Returns!! Come hang out at Pixar with this week's guests, "Toy Story 5" Co-Director and Co-Writer, Kenna Harris and Story Lead Steph Waldo! You'll hear about the most HIDDEN Toy Story 5 easter eggs and watch us try to draw a pizza with sunglasses... Oh! And don't forget to check out Disney/Pixar's TOY STORY 5, now in theaters -- and check out more episodes of THE PIXAR SHOW!! 

0:17 - Introductions 
1:06 - Who's your favorite little guy? 
3:07 - Animating the characters 
4:19 - Writing the characters 
5:11 - Character growth 
6:09 - Honoring the characters 
7:18 - Bullseye writers bible 
8:07 - Joan Cusack is Jessie in real life 
9:12 - Casting Toy Story 5 
11:00 - Pitching; Kenna keeps you safe 
11:52 - Multi-Buzz concept 
12:34 - Drawing Challenge #1 Pizza with Sunglasses 
13:36 - Toy Story 5 easter eggs 
15:12 - Drawing Challenge #2 Draw a new toy / Casting 
17:34 - Outro

author: Pixar YouTube
text:
ASMR: Woody's Restoration | Sound Design Clip from Toy Story 2
Take a listen to the soothing sounds of "Toy Story 2" during Woody's restoration. No music or dialogue, just the incredible work from the Pixar Sound Department and Skywalker Sound. Headphones are recommended for the best audio experience! See more on THE PIXAR SHOW! Also check out more sound design and mixes from Skywalker Sound at https://www.youtube.com/@skywalkersound6247

author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5 | Taylor Swift Featurette | Now Playing Only In Theaters
"It means so much to me to be a part of this film."

Taylor Swift reflects on the inspiration behind her #1 original song “I Knew It, I Knew You,” from the #1 movie in the world, Toy Story 5! Experience it in theaters now.
